name: Janeane Garofalo
bio: Janeane Garofalo is an American stand-up comedian and actor whose dry, self-deprecating, alternative-comedy style made her a defining voice of the 1990s scene. She broke through on The Ben Stiller Show and The Larry Sanders Show and appeared in films including Reality Bites and The Truth About Cats and Dogs. She has remained an active stand-up and an outspoken political commentator.

timeline.ev: Cast member on The Ben Stiller Show
Appears in Reality Bites and on The Larry Sanders Show
HBO Comedy Hour stand-up special airs
